hero.title: Same-Scene Multi-camera Storyboards
hero.description: Generate multiple camera angle variations from a single scene. Upload your reference image and AI creates diverse shot compositions—wide shots, medium shots, close-ups, and creative angles—all maintaining perfect scene consistency. Essential for filmmakers planning comprehensive shot coverage.

steps.title: Upload your scene reference
steps.description: Provide a single scene image. Nano Banana Pro analyzes the environment, subjects, lighting, and spatial relationships to understand the scene context.

steps.title: AI generates camera variations
steps.description: The workflow creates multiple camera angle variations: establishing shots, coverage angles, detail shots, and creative perspectives—all from the same scene.

steps.title: Maintain scene consistency
steps.description: All generated shots preserve the original scene's lighting, color grading, subject appearance, and environmental details for seamless integration.

steps.title: Export shot coverage set
steps.description: Download a complete set of camera angle variations ready for shot planning, client presentations, or production reference.

items.question: What is the Multi-camera Storyboards workflow?
items.answer: This AI workflow generates multiple camera angle variations from a single scene reference image. It creates diverse shot compositions while maintaining perfect consistency in lighting, subjects, and environment across all variations.

items.question: What types of camera angles does it generate?
items.answer: The workflow creates a comprehensive range: establishing wide shots, medium coverage shots, close-ups on subjects, over-the-shoulder angles, low angles, high angles, and creative perspectives—all from your single reference scene.

items.question: How does it maintain scene consistency?
items.answer: Nano Banana Pro analyzes your reference image to understand all scene elements—lighting direction, color palette, subject details, and spatial layout—then preserves these elements across all generated camera angle variations.

items.question: What AI model powers this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses Nano Banana Pro for generating camera angle variations while maintaining visual consistency across all shots in the scene coverage set.

items.question: How many angle variations can I generate?
items.answer: You can generate multiple camera angle variations in a single workflow run. The number depends on your needs—typically 6-12 variations provide comprehensive scene coverage.

items.question: Is this useful for actual film production?
items.answer: Yes, the generated storyboards serve as excellent pre-production references. They help plan shot lists, communicate vision to crew members, and ensure comprehensive coverage during actual filming.

items.question: Can I use this for commercial projects?
items.answer: Absolutely. The generated shot variations can be used for commercial film productions, advertising storyboards, music video planning, and client presentations.

items.question: What makes this different from regular storyboard generation?
items.answer: Unlike script-to-storyboard workflows, this focuses on exploring camera angle variations within a single scene. It's designed for shot coverage planning rather than narrative sequence visualization.
